name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 2/3 cups mashed sweet potatoes; if stringy, use a ricer
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add sugar, spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, pumpkin pie spice), and other seasonings (salt, vanilla).
3. Gradually add mashed sweet potatoes, flour, and melted butter to the egg mixture. Mix well to combine.
4. Pour the batter into two unbaked 9-inch pie shells.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 40 to 50 minutes, or until set like a custard pie.
